hero.subtitle: Bachelor of Science in Information Systems
hero.location: Building systems that matter · Davao, Philippines

about.heading:
Driven by systems,
shaped by curiosity.
about.bio1: I'm Christian John, an Information Systems graduate passionate about bridging the gap between technology and real-world problems. I design and build solutions that are both functional and thoughtful.
about.bio2: From database architecture to front-end interfaces, I thrive in the full spectrum of IS work — always asking how systems can serve people better.

projects.hint: 💡 Hint: Solves a real campus problem.
💡 Hint: Turns raw data into decisions.
💡 Hint: Built for scale, designed for speed.

gallery.caption: Our org's general assembly — where it all started.
Late nights finalizing our thesis manuscript.
The crew that made every deadline bearable.
Defending our capstone project — all the hard work paid off.
Acquaintance party — first year, first memories.
System demo day — watching our project come to life.
Last semester lunch — bittersweet but unforgettable.
